LAW AND MOTION 301, PETITIONER DEBORAH C. MURRAY'S PETITION FOR WRIT OF ADMINISTRATIVE MANDAMUS. THE COURT REFERRED THE CASE BACK TO THE HEARING OFFICER WA TO CONSIDER THE EVIDENCE OTHER THAN THE PLAINTIFF'S TESTIMONY. THE COURT CANNOT DETERMINE IF THE HEARING OFFICER'S EVIDENCE IN THIS CASE SUPPORT THE FINDINGS. THE COURT REMANDS MR. WA'S STATEMENT OF DECISION BACK TO HIM TO LOOK AT, REVISE AND ADVISE COURT. AFTER MR. WA SUBMITS HIS AMENDED STATEMENT, COUNSEL IS TO CALL DEPT. 301 CALENDAR CLERK AND SET A NEW HEARING 10 DAYS OUT. JUDGE: JAMES WARREN, REPORTER: CHRISTINA PAXTON, CSR #1558

Re Amended Petition For Writ Of Administrative Mandamus
Off Calendar Oct-20-2005 Continued To Nov-10-05 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 301
MINI MINUTES:
Petitioner Deborah C. Murray's Petition for Writ of Administrative Mandamus is CONTINUED to November 10, 2005, on the Court's own motion. Judge James L. Warren, Reporter Christina Paxton, CSR #1558. (301/JLW)

Petitioner Deborah C. Murray'S Order To Show Cause Re: Petition For Writ Of Administrative Mandamus
Off Calendar Mar-14-2005 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Marc J. Zilversmit, Esq., 415-431-3472, for petitioner and moving party
Terry Senne, Deputy Attorney General, 510-622-2118, for respondent and opposing party

RULING:
A R G U E D; Petitioner Deborah C. Murray's Petition for Writ of Administrative Mandamus. The Court referred the case back to the hearing officer Wa to consider the evidence other than the plaintiff's testimony. The Court cannot determine if the hearing officer's evidence in this case support the findings. Please look at, revise and advise Court. The Court remands Mr. Wa's statement of decision back to him to look at, revise and advise court. After Mr. Wa submits his amended statement, counsel is to call Dept. 301 calendar clerk and set a new hearing 10 days out. (301/JLW/AC) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558

Petitioner Deborah C. Murray'S Order To Show Cause Re: Petition For Writ Of Administrative Mandamus
Off Calendar Mar-02-2005 Continued To Mar-14-05 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 301
MINI MINUTES:
RULING:
NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: PETITIONER DEBORAH C. MURRAY'S ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE RE: PETITION FOR WRIT OF ADMINISTRATIVE MANDAMUS is CONTINUED TO 3/14/05 ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION. BOTH PARTIES ARE TO SEND COURTESY COPIES OF THEIR MOVING AND OPPOSITION PAPERS TO DEPT. 301 WITH A COVER LETTER REFERENCING THE NEW HEARING AS SOON AS POSSIBLE. (301/JLW/ac) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558
